spec_match.rationale: Multiple field configurations, an explicit Arabic `dir=rtl` input, and string/two-value `text-overflow` examples with `CSS.supports()` readouts expose the clip-on-focus behaviour and fallback path.

interactive.rationale: Seven real focusable inputs let visitors click, type, and navigate through normal, static clip, password, readonly, RTL, custom-string, and two-value overflow cases.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb promises diverse field types and configurations, and the page now renders real RTL plus detected custom marker configurations.

edge_cases.rationale: Readonly, password, true RTL, string marker, two-value marker, static clip baseline, and End/Arrow caret instrumentation are covered with live readouts.

design_system.rationale: Variables-only colours, no glyph icons, no raw hex.

summary: Useful breadth across field types with ChromeStatus reference, static clip baseline, and keyboard-caret guidance. Chrome DevTools MCP in Headless Chrome Canary 151 verified the baseline field computes to `text-overflow: clip`, End/Arrow caret readouts update, all inputs are named, and the console is clean.
